title: Napier Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Napier, with a Z-Score of -3.29. This rare event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing unusually cold temperatures, with a significant increase in Heating Degree Days (HDD) to 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is high at 81%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.1 km/h. 
 No Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are expected, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Monitoring of the situation is required to respond to potential disruptions.
